entities:
Axon | PRODUCT | Local-first Retrieval-Augmented Generation framework published on PyPI as axon-rag
jyunming | PERSON | Developer and maintainer of the Axon RAG framework
Ollama | PRODUCT | Runtime for running large language models locally without cloud dependencies
pytest | PRODUCT | Python testing framework used to run Axon's test suite of over 3300 tests
black | PRODUCT | Python code formatter pinned at version 23.12.1 in Axon's development workflow
ruff | PRODUCT | Fast Python linter and import sorter used alongside black in Axon's pre-commit hook
mypy | PRODUCT | Static type checker used for Python type annotation verification in Axon
GitHub Actions | PRODUCT | CI/CD platform running the Axon test suite and release pipeline on every pull request
GitHub Copilot | PRODUCT | AI code reviewer that automatically reviews all Axon pull requests
PyPI | PRODUCT | Python Package Index where Axon is published under the name axon-rag
